title: Padown #6303
definition:
Padon = "ransom"

 1) an head or ancestor of a family of temple slaves who returned with
    Zerubbabel
nasbUsage:
Definition: Padon = "ransom"

 1) an head or ancestor of a family of temple slaves who returned with
    Zerubbabel

    NASB:  ransom, head of a family of Nethinim
